Skip to contents
mums2 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Annotations
  • Changelog

Print Community Object

Source: R/community_object.R
print.community_object.Rd

S3 function for print the community object

Usage

# S3 method for class 'community_object'
print(x, ...)

Arguments

x

the object created from the create_community_object() function.

...

other parameters that are included in the print function.

Examples

data <-
   import_all_data(peak_table =
                   mums2::mums2_example("botryllus_pt_small.csv"),
                   metadata =
                   mums2::mums2_example("boryillus_metadata.csv"),
                   format = "None")



matched_data <- ms2_ms1_compare(mums2_example("botryllus_v2.gnps.mgf"),
 data, 1, 6)
#> [1] "Reading: /home/runner/work/_temp/Library/mums2/extdata/botryllus_v2.gnps.mgf ..."

#> [1] "17/349 peaks have an MS2 spectra."

community_object <- create_community_matrix_object(matched_data)
print(community_object)
#>                            559.37264 Da 448.87 s 882.45822 Da 458.82 s
